subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God, who art attracted by the divine fragrances! Thy radiant letter hath reached me, and I respond to thee with this uniquely titled missive [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امه الله المنجذبهه بنفحات الله قد وصلتنی نمیقتک الغراء و اجیبک بهذا الفریده الاسماء
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @blind imitation [taqlid], @transcendence; unknowability of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @knowledge; recognition of God, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @prayer for healing
